allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); segs=d.get\('projects',{}\).get\(list\(d.get\('projects',{}\).keys\(\)\)[0],{}\).get\('labels',[{}]\)[0].get\('annotations',{}\).get\('segments',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(segs, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); proj_id=list\(d.get\('projects',{}\).keys\(\)\)[0]; label=d.get\('projects',{}\).get\(proj_id,{}\).get\('labels',[{}]\)[0]; wh=label.get\('label_details',{}\).get\('project_details',{}\).get\('workflow_history',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(wh, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; lines=sys.stdin.readlines\(\); d=json.loads\(lines[3]\); proj_id=list\(d.get\('projects',{}\).keys\(\)\)[0]; label=d.get\('projects',{}\).get\(proj_id,{}\).get\('labels',[{}]\)[0]; print\(json.dumps\(label.get\('label_details',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; [print\('Line', i, '- has project_details:', 'project_details' in json.loads\(line\).get\('projects', {}\).get\(list\(json.loads\(line\).get\('projects', {}\).keys\(\)\)[0] if json.loads\(line\).get\('projects'\) else '', {}\).get\('labels', [{}]\)[0].get\('label_details', {}\)\) for i, line in enumerate\(sys.stdin.readlines\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); pid=list\(d.get\('projects',{}\).keys\(\)\)[0] if d.get\('projects'\) else None; proj=d['projects'][pid] if pid else {}; print\('keys at proj:', list\(proj.keys\(\)\)\); print\('project_details keys:', list\(proj.get\('project_details',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('label keys:', list\(proj.get\('labels',[{}]\)[0].keys\(\)\) if proj.get\('labels'\) else None\); print\('label_details keys:', list\(proj.get\('labels',[{}]\)[0].get\('label_details',{}\).keys\(\)\) if proj.get\('labels'\) else None\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); pid=list\(d.get\('projects',{}\).keys\(\)\)[0]; proj=d['projects'][pid]; print\('workflow_status:', proj['project_details'].get\('workflow_status'\)\); print\('workflow_history:', json.dumps\(proj['project_details'].get\('workflow_history'\), indent=2\)[:500]\); print\('label_details.reviews:', json.dumps\(proj['labels'][0]['label_details'].get\('reviews'\), indent=2\)[:500]\)")
